sglang.title: [Performance, Hardware] MoE weights padding to AMD MI300x GPUs
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Padding MoE weights (last dim) to minimize Memory Channel Contention (only to AMD Instinct GPUs)
Test shows approximate performance boost of prefill +2.2%, decode +3.0% for Grok-1 on setting: b32/i1024/o512
Modifications
As mentioned: fused_moe.py and layer.py

sglang.title: [Performance, Triton Kernel Args] _decode_grouped_softmax_reducev_fwd…
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
… speedup on ROCm

Motivation
Speedup _decode_grouped_softmax_reducev_fwd.
Test shows ~1.0% improvement to median decode throughput on MI300x with Grok-1 and FP8 (b32/i1024/o256)
Modifications
Setting optimal kernel arguments to _fwd_grouped_kernel_stage2 on ROCm.
Checklist

[+] Format your code acc

vllm.title: [TPU] Correctly profile peak memory usage & Upgrade PyTorch XLA
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Should be merged after #9437 and after the 10/17 version of PyTorch XLA nightly is available.
This PR upgrades the PyTorch XLA, and uses the peak_bytes_used to correctly profile the peak HBM usage during the dummy profile run.

Add chunked-prefill support on the current FlashInfer implementation as per discussion it will remain for a while until cascade inference is stable. Once cascade inference integration is done, we'll add support on that.

vllm.title: [Bugfix][core] replace heartbeat with pid check
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There are known cases where the MQLLMEngine will block up the GIL for quite a long time, which will cause it to fail to send back heartbeats to the client, crashing the whole application. This can happen when running guided decoding, or processing large multimodal inputs. Given that we know the engi

vllm.author: CRZbulabula
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the exception trace in compilation tests consist with server's exceptions and client's exceptions, wherera the exceptions from the client are usually too long and useless. vllm.title: [Misc][OpenAI] deprecate max_tokens in favor of new max_completion_tokens field for chat completion endpoint
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
OpenAI deprecated the max_tokens field in favor of the new max_completion_tokens field for its create chat completion request.
Libraries like Microsoft Semantic-kernel are using the new max_completion_tokens field in their create chat request, leading to a pydantic validation error.
{"object":"error
